text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I walk into my office to find a listless Mejiro
Ardan staring out the window.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I sincerely apologize. It's a minor thing... Truly, a
minor thing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But the other day, I went online and ordered
volumes one and two of a book I've been wanting
to read.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But when they arrived, I discovered that volume
one had the original cover, while volume two had
the modernized redesign. They look so
mismatched on my bookshelf...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... I knew I should have taken the time to
actually visit a bookstore and purchase them in
person.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her expression no brighter than before, Mejiro
Ardan lets out a long sigh...
